label: music
value: Wave to Earth on repeat — "seasons" got me through paper deadlines.

label: coffee
value: Single-origin filter > espresso. Currently obsessed with Ethiopian Yirgacheffe.

label: non-research reading
value: Murakami's short stories, anything by Ted Chiang.

label: hobbies
value: Bouldering (V4 grade, slowly inching toward V5), film photography on a Pentax MX.

label: dev setup
value: Neovim + tmux on macOS. Catppuccin Mocha everywhere. JetBrains Mono.

label: fun fact
value: I once tried to fine-tune a model on my own handwriting. It did not go well.
